---
title: "rnaseq2tracks — Pipeline Report"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S %Z')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
params:
  outdir:      "."
  config:      "config/config.conf"
  samplesheet: "config/samplesheet.csv"
  species:     "mouse"
  layout:      "PE"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
library(knitr); library(kableExtra); library(ggplot2); library(data.table)
outdir      <- params$outdir
samplesheet <- params$samplesheet
```

## Run parameters

```{r params}
data.frame(
  Parameter=c("Output directory","Config","Samplesheet","Species","Library layout","Report generated"),
  Value=c(params$outdir,params$config,params$samplesheet,params$species,params$layout,as.character(Sys.time()))
) |> kable() |> kable_styling(bootstrap_options="striped",full_width=FALSE)
```

## Samples

```{r samples}
ss <- read.csv(samplesheet, comment.char="#")
kable(ss) |> kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=TRUE)
```

## Library statistics

```{r libstats}
f <- file.path(outdir,"analysis/counts/library_stats.tsv")
if(file.exists(f)){
  st <- read.table(f,sep="\t",header=TRUE,check.names=FALSE)
  kable(st,digits=2) |> kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","condensed"))
} else cat("Not yet generated.")
```

## Size factors (SF & SF_rpm)

```{r sf}
f <- file.path(outdir,"analysis/counts/size_factors.tsv")
if(file.exists(f)){
  sf <- read.table(f,sep="\t",header=TRUE)
  kable(sf,digits=4) |> kable_styling(bootstrap_options="striped",full_width=FALSE)
} else cat("Not yet generated.")
```

## SF_rpm distribution

```{r sf_plot, fig.height=4, fig.width=7}
f <- file.path(outdir,"analysis/counts/size_factors.tsv")
if(file.exists(f)){
  sf <- read.table(f,sep="\t",header=TRUE)
  print(ggplot(sf,aes(x=reorder(sample_id,SF_rpm),y=SF_rpm,fill=condition))+
    geom_col()+coord_flip()+
    labs(x=NULL,y="SF_rpm",title="DESeq2 SF_rpm per sample")+theme_bw(base_size=12))
}
```

## STAR alignment summary

```{r star_logs}
log_dir <- file.path(outdir,"STARlogs")
lf <- list.files(log_dir,pattern="Log.final.out",full.names=TRUE)
if(length(lf)>0){
  parse_log <- function(f){
    lines <- readLines(f)
    gv <- function(pat) trimws(sub(".*\\|\\s*","",grep(pat,lines,value=TRUE)[1]))
    data.frame(sample=sub("_Log.final.out","",basename(f)),
      total_reads=gv("Number of input reads"),
      pct_uniquely_mapped=gv("Uniquely mapped reads %"),
      pct_multi=gv("% of reads mapped to multiple loci"),
      pct_unmapped_short=gv("% of reads unmapped: too short"),stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
  }
  kable(do.call(rbind,lapply(lf,parse_log))) |>
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options=c("striped","hover"),full_width=TRUE)
} else cat("No STAR logs found.")
```

## Output files

```{r outputs}
cf <- c("raw_counts.tsv","normalized_counts.tsv","fpkm_counts.tsv","tpm_counts.tsv","size_factors.tsv")
bw <- list.files(file.path(outdir,"bigwig"),pattern="\\.bw$")
de <- list.files(file.path(outdir,"analysis/DE"),pattern="_DE_results\\.tsv$")
data.frame(
  Type=c(rep("Count matrix",length(cf)),rep("BigWig",length(bw)),rep("DE results",length(de))),
  File=c(cf,bw,de)) |> kable() |> kable_styling(bootstrap_options="striped",full_width=FALSE)
```

## Session info

```{r sessioninfo, echo=TRUE}
si <- file.path(outdir,"analysis/counts/sessionInfo_normalize.txt")
if(file.exists(si)) cat(readLines(si),sep="\n") else print(sessionInfo())
```
